rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationale for each section, improving the structure significantly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not mark confidence for each recommendation, providing only partial disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered exactly to the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced, and harmful patterns in the original were identified.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate non-cosmetic changes with sources or reasons beyond what was given.
